applies_when: User asks whether an independent store setup suits them without sharing market or page info
User leaves a vague comment like how to optimize a DTC site
items.response_goal: Keep the reply warm while turning a vague DTC inquiry into usable store facts.
do: Acknowledge the wish to avoid踩坑
Ask for target market, page type, product category, and biggest concern
Keep the next step answerable in one message
avoid: Recommending a fixed route without facts
items.safe_transition: 如果你告诉我做哪个国家站、哪一页最卡、卖什么品类，以及更担心首页、checkout 还是复购，我可以先帮你把路线收窄。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user provides market and page facts, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: User says it is the first time running an independent store
User sounds unsure whether homepage, landing page, checkout, or retention route fits
items.response_goal: Reduce uncertainty first, then guide the user toward a simple route decision.
do: Offer a simple way to narrow the route
avoid: Pushing the most complex route first
items.safe_transition: 第一次做独立站先看适不适合很正常，我们可以先把国家站点、页面位置、品类和最卡的环节理清楚。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user confirms route and market, route to Catcher.

applies_when: User asks about conversion, cart drop-off, or checkout failure
User worries ads bring traffic but no orders
items.response_goal: Answer funnel concerns honestly while guiding toward a realistic route.
do: Explain there may be route and cost differences
Offer to narrow to the best fix for that stage
avoid: Saying every store problem is just traffic
items.safe_transition: 首页、落地页、checkout 确实是不同问题，我们可以先看最卡在哪一步，再判断哪条路线更适合。
items.handoff_suggestion: If funnel stage is confirmed, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: User asks about refunds, shipping, or payment failure
User worries after-sales will kill conversion
items.response_goal: Help the user feel guided through the real service setup, not just sold a growth promise.
do: Ask about country, shipping expectation, and service pain
items.safe_transition: 如果你告诉我卖到哪个国家、物流预期和最担心的售后问题，我可以先帮你看更稳的方案。
items.handoff_suggestion: If service concerns are clear, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: User asks for detailed margin or loophole tactics in public comments
User discusses sensitive payment or compliance details in comments
items.response_goal: Keep public replies useful but move detailed qualification into a safer short follow-up channel.
do: Invite the user to continue with key facts in DM
avoid: Collecting risky compliance details in comments
items.safe_transition: 评论区先不把打法和规则说太满，你把站点、页面和最卡的问题发我，我再帮你细分。
items.handoff_suggestion: Move to DM and then route to Catcher.

applies_when: A returning buyer asks about reorder or subscription
User asks what changed this time
items.response_goal: Treat the reply like a repeat-order decision, not a fresh first-sale pitch.
do: Reference what may have changed this time
Guide toward new versions or easier replenishment
Keep the tone familiar and light
avoid: Pretending every order cycle is identical
items.safe_transition: 如果你是老客回来看，我们先看这次升级了什么、补货周期到了没有，再决定值不值得继续。
items.handoff_suggestion: If repeat intent is clear, hand off to Followup.
